segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: The digital euro is a surveillance and control tool from the ECB.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Every payment in the wallet can be tracked, limited, or switched off.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Once cash disappears, Brussels can control what you buy and where you go.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: They call it convenience, but it is financial surveillance.
